title: Focus Not Obscured requires manual or visual validation
description: Static markup cannot prove whether focused components are obscured in all states.
testMethod: Collect focusable element evidence and require manual validation.
remediationGuidance: Ensure focused controls are not fully hidden by sticky headers, dialogs, overlays, or viewport constraints.

title: Target Size requires layout validation
description: Static markup alone cannot reliably prove rendered target size.
testMethod: Use Selenium evidence and manual review for rendered target size.
remediationGuidance: Ensure pointer targets meet WCAG 2.2 target size or spacing exceptions.
